title: Vanilla Recopilation
description: A carefully curated vanilla-style resource pack recompilation optimized for modern performance engines, featuring glowing ores, realistic celestial bodies, and enhanced visual fidelity without sacrificing the classic Minecraft essence.Best experienced with
body:
What is Vanilla Compilation? . Simple but loaded with thousands of improvements in the Minecraft interface, textures and many Tweaks.
All this while preserving not only the aesthetics but also the vanilla essence itself. The improvements will be noticed immediately when you open the game

Do you really want to feel the big change?
I recommend playing Minecraft Vanilla first without my Vanilla Recopilation texture pack for 5 to 10 minutes and then playing the rest of the time with the texture pack activated. The images don't say it all, the Experience of Reimagining Minecraft Yes!!! .

______________________________________________________________________________________________

#       Recommended Mods for Full Functionality of this Resource Pack        
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

1. [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

2. [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
  
3. [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

4. [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/project/PRN43VSY)

5. [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/project/JuksLGBQ)

[                    Join my Discord!!](https://discord.gg/QGes3nNqHK)


_______________________________________________________________________________________________


Credits and Acknowledgments / Credits & Authors
This is a custom collection of resources. All rights belong to the original creators listed below:

Visible Ores Plus - Created by: Tech_Wiz_03 (Inspired by mineral outline concepts).

Emissive Ores - Created by: Zethariel or PandaDojo (Depending on the base version used).

Realistic Sun & Moon - Created by: Fire_Fist or frequently used in Misa's Realistic packs.

Vanilla Experience + - Created by: The_S0ul_St0ne (General visual improvements).

Icons - Created by: Toby109tt (Changes the interface and menu icons).

Enchantment Glow - Created by: Pessimist (Adjusts enchantment glow).

Clean Water - Based on the concepts of Xisumavoid's Vanilla Tweaks or Nate's Tweaks.

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

# Español
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

¿Qué es Vanilla Recopilation? Es simple, pero incluye miles de mejoras en la interfaz, texturas y ajustes de Minecraft.

Todo esto conservando no solo la estética, sino también la esencia original. Notarás las mejoras inmediatamente al abrir el juego.

¿Quieres experimentar el gran cambio?

Te recomiendo jugar primero a Minecraft Vanilla sin mi paquete de texturas durante 5 a 10 minutos y luego jugar el resto del tiempo con el paquete Vanilla Recopilation. Las imágenes no lo dicen todo: ¡la experiencia de reinventar Minecraft Si !!
